name: Ice Pet Match
description: Ice Pet Match is a connection-based with challenging levels. Classic block puzzle game with challenging levels Smashed all stress and try your hand at the most addictive game. Increase the concentration for this block puzzle game
instructions: Aim is to COLLECT ALL OF THE ITEMS before the time is over Find two IDENTICAL ITEMS and tap on to connect them ITEMS can be connected with up to 3 STRAIGHT LINES where there is no other tile blocking the line path
